title: Proposal 0001 — Harness Feedback Ingestion
summary: Proposes an optional bridge path that fetches and parses a CI harness bridge.json manifest to feed structured, scenario-level failure diagnostics into the retry prompt.
notes: Numbered filename (0001-) and ADR-style structure (Goals/Design/Security/Consequences) signal ADR, but Status is 'Draft / Proposed' so locked=false. Competing SPEC signals are strong (config-key surface, consumed bridge.json schema_version 2, spec section amendments), but the doc frames itself as a proposal/decision document and explicitly defers normative producer-schema authorship to a companion spec; ambiguity resolved toward ADR per ADR > SPEC precedence. Confidence medium: content signals only, no frontmatter type, and ADR/SPEC compete.
